item.name: Snowman Bell
item.description: For some reason, ringing this bell summons forth a behatted and begloved embodiment of festive cheer. With that in mind, it would be rather a shame not to ring it.

mount.name: Snowman
mount.action: Summon forth a behatted and begloved embodiment of festive cheer.
mount.description: Scholars maintain that the tradition of building snowmen originated in Gyr Abania, where they were used to encourage blessings such as “cold” and “snow.” Considering that the region is almost entirely covered in arid desert, how the snowmen were built in the first place remains a mystery.
mount.tooltip:
Two words:
stupendous snowman...
- Adventurer Who Shall Remain Unnamed
